title: Meghan's Brand and Netflix Stop Working Together
summary: Meghan, the Duchess of Sussex, has a lifestyle brand called As ever that makes things like jam and cookies. Last year, Netflix helped pay for the brand to start. Now, they have decided to end their partnership. This means As ever will be on its own without Netflix's help. Netflix said they are happy they could help Meghan's brand grow. Meghan will keep running As ever by herself. This is different from her TV shows with Netflix, which did not do very well. The brand is now ready to be independent and continue making products.

keywords.explanation: a company that sells products for everyday life
doing something on your own without help
a company that shows movies and TV shows online
things that are made and sold, like jam or cookies

questions.question: What is the name of Meghan's lifestyle brand?
Who helped pay for Meghan's brand when it started?
What did Netflix and As ever decide to do?
What will As ever do now without Netflix?
What kind of products does As ever sell?
Why did Netflix say they were glad to help Meghan's brand?
options: To bring her vision to life
To move to a new studio
questions.correct_answer: To bring her vision to life

background_read: Meghan is the Duchess of Sussex, married to Prince Harry. She started a brand called As ever that sells food items like jam. Netflix is a big company that streams movies and shows. Sometimes, companies work together in partnerships to help each other grow. When a brand becomes independent, it means it can make decisions on its own without help from others.
Article_Structure: WHO: Meghan, the Duchess of Sussex, and her brand As ever, with Netflix
WHAT: They ended their partnership, so As ever is now independent
WHERE: This happened in the business world, not in a specific place
WHY: As ever grew quickly and is ready to stand on its own without Netflix's help

perspectives.description: As ever became successful quickly and no longer needs Netflix's support to continue.
